calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yao Mei Huang was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Kenneth Soohoo, a/k/a Kenneth Fred Soohoo.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Charles Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kenneth Yao Huang.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Reset To Dec-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yao Mei Huang was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for minor Kenneth Soohoo, a/k/a Kenneth Fred Soohoo.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Charles J. Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court is unable to proceed with the proposed change of name of the minor as there is no indication in the case file that the minor's father, Jack Soohoo, was given notice of today's hearing.

Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of the minor is continued to December 4, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218. No further publication is required.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Reset To Nov-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yao Mei Huang was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Kenneth Soohoo, who was also present at today's hearing.
Charles J. Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Service in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with the proposed name change of the minor as there is no indication in the case file that the minor's father was given notice of today's hearing. Good cause appearing, the hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to November 20, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218. No further publication is required by petitioner.

Petitioner was sent to the Access Center to seek assistance with preparation of the required documents.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Reset To Nov-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Yao Mei Huang was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Kenneth Fred Soo Hoo, who was not present at today's hearing.
Charles Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in file.

Petitioner did not provide the Court with a Proof of Service indicating that the minor's father was provided notice of the proposed change of name for the minor.

Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of the minor, Kenneth Fred Soo Hoo, is continued to November 6, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to shall provide the Court with a proof of service that the minor's father was given notice of the new hearing date for the proposed name change, or petition the Court to dispense with said notice.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Petitioner: Yao Huang, present in pro per and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Application to dispense with notice to minor's father filed 5-2-07 with the same facts of the previously filed application.
Matter is ordered off-calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Yao Mei Huang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Kenneth Fred Soo Hoo, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Petitioner's request to Dispensing Notice was Denied without prejudice in open court.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor ordered off-calendar.
